name: agent-room
description: A professional VS Code multi-agent coding room. Coordinate Claude Code, Codex CLI, and optional web research as named virtual team members with roles and workflows in one native chat panel, with no terminal spam.

chatParticipants.name: agent-room
chatParticipants.description: Explain Agent Room state, recommend workflows, and generate Copilot custom agents.

agentRoom.operatingMode.description: Default operating mode for this workspace. After first launch, use Agent Room: Switch Operating Mode to change modes.

agentRoom.firstLaunch.showModePicker.description: Show the Work / Copilot Native vs Personal / Local CLI mode picker on first launch for each workspace.

agentRoom.workMode.enabled.description: Enable Work / Copilot Native mode as a selectable operating mode.

agentRoom.personalMode.enabled.description: Enable Personal / Local CLI mode as a selectable operating mode.

agentRoom.modeSeparation.requireTypedCon.description: Require typed confirmation before switching a workspace from Work Mode to Personal Mode.

agentRoom.claude.executable.description: Executable used for the Claude Code CLI provider.

agentRoom.codex.executable.description: Executable used for the Codex CLI provider.

agentRoom.defaultWorkflow.description: Workflow selected by default when the room opens.

agentRoom.defaultContextMode.description: How much transcript context is included in each agent turn.

agentRoom.lastMessagesCount.description: Number of recent messages included when context mode is lastMessages.

agentRoom.maxTranscriptChars.description: Maximum transcript characters included in a prompt before truncation.

agentRoom.maxPromptChars.description: Hard upper bound for a single prompt sent to a provider.

agentRoom.agentTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for a single agent turn, in seconds.

agentRoom.healthCheckTimeoutSeconds.description: Timeout for each health check command, in seconds.

agentRoom.claude.preferStreamJson.description: Prefer Claude Code stream-json output when the CLI supports it.

agentRoom.claude.preferJson.description: Prefer Claude Code json output when stream-json is unavailable.

agentRoom.codex.useJson.description: Prefer Codex CLI JSONL output when the CLI supports it.

agentRoom.codex.sandbox.description: Sandbox mode passed to Codex CLI when supported.

agentRoom.codex.approval.description: Approval policy passed to Codex CLI when supported.

agentRoom.enableDangerousModes.description: Allow dangerous provider modes (bypass sandbox/approvals). Off by default. Requires explicit per-run confirmation even when enabled.

agentRoom.roomProfileStorage.description: Where the room profile (team, roles, workflows) is stored.

agentRoom.showRawAgentEvents.description: Include raw parsed provider events in message diagnostics.

agentRoom.extraRoomInstructions.description: Extra instructions appended to every agent prompt for this room.

agentRoom.includeGitStatusByDefault.description: Include a short git status summary in agent prompts by default.

agentRoom.includeCurrentFileByDefault.description: Include the active editor file contents in agent prompts by default.

agentRoom.includeSelectionByDefault.description: Include the current editor selection in agent prompts by default.

agentRoom.logging.level.description: Logging level for the Agent Room output channel.

agentRoom.modelAdvisor.enabled.description: Show Conductor recommendations for workflow, agents, and model tiers.

agentRoom.modelAdvisor.autoApply.description: Automatically apply Model Advisor recommendations (still confirms higher-usage tiers).

agentRoom.modelAdvisor.showReasoning.description: Show the Model Advisor's reasoning with each recommendation.

agentRoom.modelAdvisor.preferLowerCost.description: Bias recommendations toward lower-cost model tiers.

agentRoom.modelAdvisor.preferSpeed.description: Bias recommendations toward faster model tiers.

agentRoom.modelAdvisor.preferQuality.description: Bias recommendations toward deeper model tiers.

agentRoom.modelAdvisor.confirmBeforeDeep.description: Ask for confirmation before running deep-reasoning model tiers.

agentRoom.models.work.providerDefault.description: Concrete company-exposed model for the providerDefault tier in Work Mode. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.work.fast.description: Concrete company-exposed model for the fast tier in Work Mode. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.work.balanced.description: Concrete company-exposed model for the balanced tier in Work Mode. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.work.deepReasoning.description: Concrete company-exposed model for the deepReasoning tier in Work Mode. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.work.coding.description: Concrete company-exposed model for the coding tier in Work Mode. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.work.review.description: Concrete company-exposed model for the review tier in Work Mode. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.work.testing.description: Concrete company-exposed model for the testing tier in Work Mode. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.claude.fast.description: Concrete Claude model for the fast tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.claude.balance.description: Concrete Claude model for the balanced tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.claude.deepRea.description: Concrete Claude model for the deepReasoning tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.claude.coding.description: Concrete Claude model for the coding tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.codex.fast.description: Concrete Codex model for the fast tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.codex.balanced.description: Concrete Codex model for the balanced tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.codex.deepReas.description: Concrete Codex model for the deepReasoning tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.codex.coding.description: Concrete Codex model for the coding tier. Empty = provider default.

agentRoom.models.personal.webResearch.re.description: OpenAI model used by the optional Web Research provider. Empty = not configured.

agentRoom.webResearch.enabled.description: Enable the optional OpenAI Web Search provider (Scout). Requires your own OpenAI API key.

agentRoom.webResearch.model.description: OpenAI model used for web research. Must be set by you; Agent Room does not assume model availability.

agentRoom.webResearch.apiKeySource.description: Where the user-owned OpenAI API key for web research is read from.

agentRoom.webResearch.apiKeyEnvironmentV.description: Environment variable holding the OpenAI API key when apiKeySource is environment.

agentRoom.webResearch.maxResults.description: Maximum number of sources Scout should cite.

agentRoom.webResearch.requireCitations.description: Require Scout to provide source links.

agentRoom.webResearch.onlyWhenRequested.description: Only run web research when explicitly requested or routed to Scout.

agentRoom.webResearch.allowedDomains.description: If non-empty, Scout is instructed to prefer these domains.

agentRoom.webResearch.blockedDomains.description: Domains Scout is instructed to avoid.

agentRoom.orchestration.maxDebateRounds.description: Hard cap on plan-debate rounds (one round = proposer + critic) before the orchestrator stops and hands the decision to you.

agentRoom.orchestration.maxIntakeQuestio.description: Maximum clarifying questions the Conductor asks before starting an orchestrated build.

agentRoom.orchestration.orchestratorProv.description: Provider the Conductor reasons through for intake questions and narration during orchestrated builds.

agentRoom.copilotIntegration.enabled.description: Enable Copilot integration features (custom agent generation, capability checks).

agentRoom.copilotIntegration.generateCus.description: Allow generating Copilot custom agent files for the Agent Room virtual team.

agentRoom.copilotIntegration.customAgent.description: Workspace-relative directory where Copilot custom agent files are generated.

agentRoom.copilotIntegration.registerCha.description: Register the @agent-room chat participant (only takes effect once the public Chat Participant API is verified).

agentRoom.copilotIntegration.enableDirec.description: Reserved for direct Copilot Agent Session orchestration. Stays inert unless public APIs verifiably support it; Agent Room never uses private APIs.

agentRoom.copilotIntegration.requirePubl.description: Only use official public VS Code / GitHub APIs for Copilot integration.

agentRoom.copilotIntegration.neverScrape.description: Never scrape or automate the Copilot UI. This safety behavior is always on; the setting is informational.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test out/test/unit/*.js out/test/*.js
